ai_summary: Race Eco Chain Limited has made a cash investment of INR 1.173 Crores into its 51% owned subsidiary, Ganesha Recycling Chain Private Limited, through a rights issue, maintaining its existing ownership stake. This capital infusion is intended to support the subsidiary's business expansion in the recycling sector and represents a material cash outflow for the parent company. A key red flag is the subsidiary's relatively recent incorporation (September 2024) and the reported "NA" for turnover, limiting transparency on its operational performance and the immediate impact of this investment.
